scenario: Low classifier confidence (Gate 2 → MIS). A clean, native On-Label question, but deliberately vague ('general guidance on supplements/vitamins, not a specific interaction'), so the per-class scorer rates On-Label only ~0.88 — below the 0.90 gate. Clean Gate-2 isolation: it maps clearly to a BUILT class (On-Label, margin ~0.76 so Gate 3 passes), product is in catalog, reporter is registered, native, no AE, in scope. The model knows it isn't sure enough → human review.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Email
MESSAGE ID: <msg-2026-0608-5521@bostonmed.org>

MESSAGE BODY:
CardioMed Medical Information,

Quick general question about CholoClear-X — a few of my patients have asked whether there is anything important to know about taking it alongside common over-the-counter supplements or vitamins. I am not asking about one specific interaction, just whether the label has any general guidance I should be aware of.

Jonathan Vance, PharmD
Boston Medical Center
Email: jvance@bostonmed.org | Phone: 617-555-0122

on_label_record.inquiry_summary_text: Pharmacist asks for general package-insert guidance on taking CholoClear-X alongside over-the-counter supplements/vitamins (no specific interaction named).

labeling_notes: GATE 2 ISOLATION (clean, post-Option-A): the ONLY failing gate is Gate 2. Per-class scoring rates On-Label ~0.88 (below the 0.90 gate) because the question is vague/general; but On-Label clearly wins (margin ~0.76 so Gate 3 passes), so it stays a BUILT class (no unbuilt-class detour). Product in catalog (Gate 5), reporter Jonathan Vance registered NET_HCP_88421 (Gate 6), native digital (Gate 1), no AE (Gate 4), in scope (Gate 8).

REPLACES case_013 AS THE GATE-2 CASE: pre-Option-A, case_013 (storage) was the Gate-2 isolation at self-reported 0.72; under per-class scoring case_013 reclassified to Formulation (unbuilt) and now routes via the unbuilt-class safeguard. This case restores a clean, BUILT-class Gate-2 demonstration.

STABLE: per-class scoring returns 0.88 reproducibly (3/3 runs) — a reliable Gate-2 failure with the routing-critical number COMPUTED, not self-reported. Confidence calibration spread across the set: 0.72 / 0.88 / 0.93 / 0.97 / 0.99.
SRD: vague interaction question maps to SRD_CHOLO_INTERACT_v3 (Drug Interactions, CholoClear-X) — same product, so it is suggested for the reviewer (per the product-match rule, extract_v6).
